title: Tiny Tasks
description: Adds a fun task system with a leaderboard
body:
Ever wanted some fun system giving you random tasks to do in Minecraft? Tiny Tasks is a server-side mod that adds a task system to Minecraft, giving you random tasks to complete. 
The tasks are automatically chosen and reported in the chat and move on to the next when they finish.
These tasks can be anything from eating a specific food, crafting a specific item, equipping a specific armor piece, or even mining a specific block.
Each time a task is completed the player will be rewarded with points on the scoreboard.
